tests.name: send_push
tests.note: Anonymous callers must not invoke privileged push flows. A 404 usually means the function is not deployed in this environment.

tests.name: list_accessible_organizations
tests.note: Authenticated users without membership should not receive JJVV context. A 404 indicates a deployment/schema-cache mismatch for this RPC in the live project.

tests.name: profiles-own-only
tests.note: A no-membership user should see only their own profile row.
